meta.title: Customer Voices | AmberNord
meta.description: Verified experiences from Switzerland: voices on the AmberNord sea-buckthorn elixir after at least 14 days of daily use.

og.title: Customer Voices | AmberNord
og.description: Verified experiences from Switzerland: voices on the AmberNord sea-buckthorn elixir.

intro.heading: Customer Voices
intro.p1: Verified experiences from Switzerland — after at least 14 days of daily use. Every review is checked against the order number.

list.heading: All Reviews
list.empty: No reviews published yet. Be the first — share your experience below.

form.heading: Submit a Review
form.intro: Your review will appear after we verify the order number. We only publish your first name and city — your email stays private.
form.name: First name (or initials)
form.textHint: Describe in your own words what changed after 14 days — energy, taste, ritual —, how the elixir tastes, and what surprised you.
form.consent: I allow AmberNord to publish my first name, city and review text on the website. My email stays private.
form.success: Thank you! Your review has been submitted. After we verify the order number, it will appear here — usually within 48 hours.

secretNote: No order yet? Get 2 × The Starter for the price of 1 — limited to 250 sets.
